chapter_title.en: Reward of reciting Surah Ankaboot and Room

text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْعَنْکَبُوتِ وَ الرُّومِ فِی شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ لَیْلَهَ ثَلَاثَهٍ وَ عِشْرِینَ فَهُوَ وَ اللَّهِ یَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّهِ لَا أَسْتَثْنِی فِیهِ أَبَداً وَ لَا أَخَافُ أَنْ یَکْتُبَ اللَّهُ عَلَیَّ فِی یَمِینِی إِثْماً وَ إِنَّ لِهَاتَیْنِ السُّورَتَیْنِ مِنَ اللَّهِ مَکَاناً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “O Aba Muhammad! One who recites Surah Ankaboot and Room on the twenty-third of the month of Ramadan would be included among the people of Paradise. I do not expect anything. Allah would not write any sins of this type. These two Surahs have a high regard near Allah.”
